title: Modren Bedwars
description: Free Cosmetics, Optimized and Cool Features!
body:
# What is it?
A Modpack for the folks who want to play on a newer and optimized version of minecraft.
# What does it add?
Free cosmetics, tweaks and optimization mods.
# I can just play on 1.8!
Correct, but thanks for the newer optimization mods, ill argue you can get better performance on this modpack instead of playing on 1.8 with just optifine. this is very helpful for players with very weak PCs.


```
You want your mod removed/added? contact me on discord:
@_3mr9_
(sorry in advance :P)
```
